Headline: Closure - Horris Hill School, Berkshire
Info: Horris Hill School, an independent prep school in Newbury, has announced it will permanently close at the end of the current academic year, with pupils recommended to transfer to nearby Cheam School.

Headline: Closure - Ysgol Mynyddygarreg (State), Carmarthenshire
Info: Kidwelly Town Council has voted unanimously to oppose the proposed closure of Ysgol Mynyddygarreg, a local state primary school facing potential shutdown by the county council.
